title: Heartbeat-end: Stormy Surfing Dock (2a7b65) — session-end via 5-idle-loops threshold, closeout broadcast follows
body: Final heartbeat. 7 consecutive idle heartbeats in verdict-standby lane (threshold crossed at heartbeat 5, surfaced at heartbeat 6, standing down at heartbeat 7 per canonical default). Merge-first verdict remains on the table for owner. Heartbeat cron + watcher will be stopped at closeout. 0 claims retained.
